mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.DEPT_NM as dept_nm, func_find_company(d.DEPT_CD) as company_nm FROM TC_USER u LEFT JOIN TC_DEPT d ON u.DEPT_CD = d.DEPT_CD
SELECT u.*, d.COMPANY_NM, d.DEPARTMENT_NM FROM TC_USER u LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE d ON u.DEPT_CD = d.ORIGIN_CD WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM TC_USER WHERE USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM TC_USER WHERE USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail} AND DELETE_YN = #{deleteYn}
SELECT * FROM TC_USER WHERE USER_CHECK_CD = #{userCheckCd} AND DELETE_YN = #{deleteYn}
SELECT USER_ID FROM TC_USER WHERE USER_ID LIKE CONCAT(#{userIdPrefix}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tc_user_mgr_comp (user_id, comp_cd, reg_id, reg_dt) VALUES (#{userId}, #{compCd}, #{regId}, #{regDt})
mapper.select: SELECT comp_cd FROM tc_user_mgr_comp WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(d.dept_nm SEPARATOR ', ') FROM tc_user_mgr_comp umc LEFT JOIN tc_dept d ON umc.comp_cd = d.dept_cd WHERE umc.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT dept_nm FROM tc_dept WHERE dept_cd = #{deptCd}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM TC_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TC_USER SET USER_EMAIL = NULL, USER_PHONE_MOBILE = NULL, USER_PHONE_OFFICE = NULL, USER_CONSENT_YN = 'N', USER_CONSENT_DT = NULL, MOD_ID = 'SYSTEM', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TC_USER ( USER_ID, DEPT_CD, USER_NM, USER_DEPT_NM, USER_PW, USER_POSITION_NM, USER_EMAIL, USER_PHONE_OFFICE, USER_PHONE_MOBILE, DELETE_YN, USER_CHECK_CD, REMARK, USER_CERT_YN, USER_CONSENT_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{deptCd}, #{userNm}, #{userDeptNm}, #{userPw}, #{userPositionNm}, #{userEmail}, #{userPhoneOffice}, #{userPhoneMobile}, #{deleteYn}, #{userCheckCd}, #{remark}, #{userCertYn}, #{userConsentYn}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TC_USER SET DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}, USER_NM = #{userNm}, USER_DEPT_NM = #{userDeptNm}, USER_PW = #{userPw}, USER_POSITION_NM = #{userPositionNm}, USER_EMAIL = #{userEmail}, USER_PHONE_OFFICE = #{userPhoneOffice}, USER_PHONE_MOBILE = #{userPhoneMobile}, DELETE_YN = #{deleteYn}, USER_CHECK_CD = #{userCheckCd}, REMARK = #{remark}, USER_CERT_YN = #{userCertYn}, USER_CONSENT_YN = #{userConsentYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW(), USER_CONSENT_DT = #{userConsentDt}, USER_CERT_DT = #{userCertDt}, USER_PW_RESET_YN = #{userPwResetYn} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.sql: SELECT u.USER_ID as userId, d.COMPANY_NM as companyNm, d.DEPARTMENT_NM as departmentNm, d.MANAGE_NM as manageNm, u.USER_DEPT_NM as userDeptNm, u.DEPT_CD as deptCd, u.USER_NM as userNm, u.USER_EMAIL as userEmail, u.USER_POSITION_NM as userPositionNm, u.USER_PHONE_OFFICE as userPhoneOffice, u.USER_PHONE_MOBILE as userPhoneMobile, u.REMARK as remark, COALESCE(u.USER_CERT_YN, 'N') as userCertYn, COALESCE(u.USER_CONSENT_YN, 'N') as userConsentYn, u.REG_DT as regDt, COALESCE(u.DELETE_YN, 'N') as deleteYn, MAX(log.ACCESS_DT) as lastAccessDt, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT g.GROUP_NM SEPARATOR ', ') as authGroup FROM TC_USER u LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE d ON u.DEPT_CD = d.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN TC_USER_ACCESS_LOG log ON u.USER_ID = log.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TC_AUTH_GROUP_USER au ON u.USER_ID = au.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TC_AUTH_GROUP g ON au.GROUP_CD = g.GROUP_CD WHERE u.USER_ID NOT IN ('admin', 'system')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.USER_ID) FROM TC_USER u LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE d ON u.DEPT_CD = d.ORIGIN_CD WHERE u.USER_ID NOT IN ('admin', 'system')

GROUP BY u.USER_ID, u.USER_NM, u.USER_EMAIL, u.DELETE_YN, u.USER_DEPT_NM, u.DEPT_CD, u.USER_POSITION_NM, u.USER_PHONE_OFFICE, u.USER_PHONE_MOBILE, u.REMARK, u.USER_CERT_YN, u.USER_CONSENT_YN, u.REG_DT, d.COMPANY_NM, d.DEPARTMENT_NM, d.MANAGE_NM ORDER BY u.REG_DT DESC
